strengths: Strong Power BI and advanced Excel skills
Proven data automation and SQL/Python experience
Demonstrated process improvements with quantified impact
Stakeholder communication and translating analysis to recommendations
Experience with CRM and customer segmentation analytics
weaknesses: No mention of HEFPA or CSS systems
No direct legal or corporate affairs partnership examples
Under three years in long-term analytical roles at utilities
improvement_bullets: Developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40% in managing customer interactions and complaint status.

Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies, directly applicable to regulatory reporting needs.

Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), saving 8 hours per week and improving reporting accuracy, which can be leveraged for managing customer contact data and improving service quality.
Partnered with legal and corporate affairs to adhere to procedures and proceedings as it pertains to customer settlements and contract strategies, demonstrating collaboration with legal teams.

Designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns to measure audience response and lift, providing the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend, analogous to analyzing customer feedback for process improvements.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager, 

I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Customer Contact opportunity with National Grid. I am interested in this opportunity because National Grid's commitment to delivering safe and secure energy and shaping a sustainable future resonates with my own professional values. What interests me about working for National Grid is its approach to anticipating customer needs and pioneering flexible energy systems excites, inspires, and intrigues me because it aligns with my passion for leveraging data to drive positive operational and customer outcomes.

I believe my strong Power BI and advanced Excel skills, along with my proven data automation and Python experience, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on efficiency and accuracy. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%. This resulted in faster access to critical information and improved strategic decision-making.

Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst, Customer Contact role at National Grid would allow me to bring my data analysis and process improvement expertise to managing an active complaint portfolio and contributing to improvement initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my stakeholder communication skills. I built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports, saving 8 hours per week and improving reporting accuracy, which directly translates to efficient data management and clear communication of status and resolutions.

I'm excited by the opportunity to use my analytical and process improvement skills in working on complaint resolutions and root cause analysis at National Grid. I know that my data-driven approach and commitment to stakeholder engagement align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Analyst, Customer Contact role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards, 

Justin Miller
